title: cicer arietinum
intro: Cicer arietinum, also known as chickpea or gram, is a plant belonging to the legume family that has been cultivated for thousands of years for its edible seeds and other uses. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Cicer arietinum include reducing cholesterol levels, lowering blood pressure, and aiding in the management of diabetes due to its high fiber and protein content. Herbal preparations of Cicer arietinum, such as tea or powder, are commonly used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
